common.title: Common Settings
common.privacyModeDescription: Stop automatic outbound requests owned by DeepChat:
common.privacyModeAcpRegistry: ACP Registry refresh and icon sync
common.privacyModeManualActions: Manual checks and manual refresh actions stay available.

autoCompaction.title: Auto Compaction
autoCompaction.description: When a conversation approaches the model context window limit, DeepChat can summarize older history automatically so the session keeps going. If disabled, DeepChat will not generate summaries, but it will still trim the request view when needed to avoid raw provider context-window errors.
autoCompaction.thresholdDescription: Start compaction when prompt usage reaches this share of the effective history budget. Lower values create more headroom; higher values preserve more raw context.
autoCompaction.retainPairsDescription: Keep the most recent completed user and assistant pairs outside compaction. The current query is not included.

common.invalidProxyUrl: Invalid proxy URL, please enter valid http/https URL
common.addCustomSearchEngineDesc: Add a new search engine by providing a name and search URL. The URL must include {query} as the query placeholder.
common.searchEngineUrlError: URL must include {'{'}query{'}'} as the query placeholder
common.deleteCustomSearchEngineDesc: Are you sure you want to delete the custom search engine "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
common.testSearchEngineDesc: A test search for "weather" will be performed using the {engine} search engine.
common.testSearchEngineNote: If the search page requires login or other actions, you can perform them in the test window. Please close the test window when you're done.
common.contentProtectionEnableDesc: Prevent screen sharing apps from capturing the DeepChat window to help protect your privacy. Not all apps honor this setting; in some environments a black window may remain.
common.contentProtectionDisableDesc: Allow screen sharing apps to capture the DeepChat window.
common.contentProtectionRestartNotice: Changing this setting will restart the application. Do you want to continue?
common.loggingEnableDesc: Enabling logging will help us diagnose issues and improve the application. Log files may contain sensitive information.
common.loggingDisableDesc: Disabling logging will stop collecting application logs.
common.loggingRestartNotice: Changing this setting will restart the application. Do you want to continue?
common.notificationsDesc: When DeepChat is not in the foreground, if a session is generated, a system notification will be sent
common.fileMaxSizeHint: Limits the maximum size of a single uploaded file

deepchatAgents.title: DeepChat Agents
deepchatAgents.description: Manage DeepChat agents and the defaults they seed into new sessions.
deepchatAgents.name: Name
deepchatAgents.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional note about what this agent is for
deepchatAgents.avatarDefaultDesc: DeepChat keeps the built-in icon. Other agents use a text avatar.
deepchatAgents.avatarLucideDesc: Pick a Lucide icon and set light/dark colors.
deepchatAgents.avatarMonogramDesc: Use two Latin letters or the first CJK character.
deepchatAgents.systemPromptPlaceholder: Leave blank for an empty system prompt
deepchatAgents.defaultProjectPathPlaceholder: Leave empty to use the global default directory
deepchatAgents.subagentsDescription: Configure the reusable child-session slots exposed to subagent_orchestrator.
deepchatAgents.compactionDescription: These defaults only affect future DeepChat sessions.
deepchatAgents.memoryDescription: Let this agent remember durable facts across sessions and evolve a self-model. Off by default for privacy.
deepchatAgents.memoryEmbeddingHint: Used for semantic recall. If unset, recall falls back to keyword search (still works).

memoryManager.title: Manage memories
memoryManager.description: Review, delete, or clear what this agent has remembered, and inspect its evolving self-model.
memoryManager.degradedHint: No embedding model configured — recall uses keyword search only.
memoryManager.clearConfirmBody: This permanently removes every memory for this agent. This cannot be undone.
memoryManager.emptyMemories: No memories yet. They accumulate as you chat with this agent.
memoryManager.sourceDialogEmpty: The source span is no longer available.
memoryManager.rollbackConfirmBody: This makes the selected version the active self-model and supersedes the current one.
memoryManager.personaEvolutionOnHint: Persona evolution is experimental. New self-models appear here as drafts and are only injected after you approve them.
memoryManager.personaEvolutionOffHint: Persona evolution is an experimental, opt-in feature and is currently off for this agent.
memoryManager.addContentPlaceholder: What you want this assistant to remember…
memoryManager.addConflict: Added, but it conflicts with an existing memory — resolve it in the list.
memoryManager.addDuplicate: A similar memory already exists; nothing was added.
memoryManager.addDisabledHint: Memory is off for this assistant. Enable it in Config before adding memories.
memoryManager.deleteConfirmBody: This removes the memory instead of archiving it. This cannot be undone.

archivePrediction.title: Current archive matches
archivePrediction.description: If maintenance ran now, these memories would meet the archive rules.
archivePrediction.empty: No memories currently meet the archive rules.

lifecycle.modelNote: Read-only baseline: recall and forgetting are separate; archive needs every condition.

recall.title: Recall
recall.inactive: Currently excluded from recall; the values below are diagnostic only.
recall.baseline: Similarity uses a no-query baseline; actual recall changes with the query.
recall.notRecallable: This kind is not recalled directly.

forget.title: Forgetting
forget.stale: Stored decay is missing or differs from the computed score.

archive.title: Archive
archive.eligible: Eligible for soft archive on the next maintenance pass.

deepchatAgents.deleteConfirm: Delete agent "{name}"? Its history will fall back to the built-in DeepChat agent.
deepchatAgents.personaEvolutionDescription: Let reflection propose updated self-models as drafts for your approval. Independent of memory; off by default.
deepchatAgents.personaEvolutionWarning: Distilled personas can drift or amplify biases from past chats. Every change needs your explicit approval — it never updates silently.
deepchatAgents.memoryManageLinkHint: Recall, models, injection budget, and persona evolution all live in the Memory settings page.

commands.title: Hooks Commands
commands.description: Run custom commands for the selected lifecycle events.
commands.hint: The full payload is sent to stdin as JSON.
commands.name: Name
commands.empty: No hooks yet. Add one to get started.
commands.guideDescription: When a checked event fires, DeepChat runs the command. The current event is available from stdin JSON, environment variables, and command placeholders.
commands.deliveryStdin: The full payload is written to stdin as JSON.
commands.deliveryPlaceholder: You can place command placeholders directly in the command line.
commands.deliveryEnv: The same core metadata is also exposed as environment variables.
commands.metadataOnly: Command placeholders are best for small metadata. Read prompt/tool details, permission, usage, stop, and error fields from stdin JSON.
commands.placeholdersDescription: Placeholders are expanded before execution, so they can be passed as command arguments.

fields.isTest: Whether this run comes from the Test button
fields.workdir: Resolved working directory for the session
fields.messageId: Current user message ID when available
fields.toolCallId: Current tool call ID when available

data.title: Data Settings

cloudSync.title: Cloud Sync (S3-compatible)
cloudSync.description: Upload backups to S3-compatible storage such as Cloudflare R2, and pull the latest backup on another device.
cloudSync.safeStorageUnavailable: System keychain unavailable; cannot securely store the secret key.
cloudSync.r2GuideTitle: Copy the S3 client credentials from the Cloudflare R2 API token page.
cloudSync.r2EndpointHint: Use the jurisdiction-specific endpoint URL for S3 clients
cloudSync.r2AccessKeyHint: Use Access Key ID, not Account ID
cloudSync.r2SecretHint: Use Secret Access Key, not the cfat_ token value
cloudSync.endpointCustomDescription: Use the endpoint for an S3-compatible service.
cloudSync.r2AccessKeyAccountIdWarning: This looks like the R2 Account ID. Access Key ID comes from the S3 client credentials section.
cloudSync.r2SecretApiTokenError: Use the S3 Secret Access Key here, not a Cloudflare API token value that starts with cfat_.
cloudSync.secretStoredDescription: A secret is saved. Leave blank to keep it, or enter a new value to replace it.
cloudSync.secretInputDescription: Copy the Secret Access Key from the S3 client credentials section.
cloudSync.r2RegionDescription: Cloudflare R2 should usually stay on auto.
cloudSync.prefixDescription: Backups are written under this path prefix.
cloudSync.saveAndTestFirst: Save and test the cloud config first.

data.backupSelectDescription: Choose the backup snapshot to import.
data.noBackupsAvailable: No backups available. Run a backup first.
data.importConfirmDescription: Importing will overwrite all current data, including chat history and settings. Make sure you have backed up important data. Data will refresh automatically after import.
data.resetConfirmDescription: Please select the type of data to reset. This operation cannot be undone and the application will restart automatically after reset.
data.resetChatDataDesc: Delete all chat history and conversation records
data.resetKnowledgeDataDesc: Delete all knowledge base files and vector data
data.resetConfigDesc: Delete all app settings, model configurations and custom prompts
data.resetAllDesc: Delete all data including chat history, configurations and cache files
data.resetCompleteDevMessage: Please manually restart the application in development mode. Stop the current process and run pnpm run dev again
data.resetDataDescription: Reset chat, knowledge, config, or all data by type.

databaseRepair.title: Database Repair
databaseRepair.description: Detect and automatically repair the database
databaseRepair.toastSuggestedDescription: DeepChat detected a schema problem ({reason}). You can run database repair now.
databaseRepair.toastManualDescription: Repaired {repaired} issue(s). {manual} issue(s) still need manual handling.
databaseRepair.toastFailedDescription: Unable to complete database repair right now. Please check the logs and try again.

databaseEncryption.title: SQLite database encryption
databaseEncryption.description: Encrypt agent.db with SQLCipher and require a SQLite password when system unlock cannot be used.
databaseEncryption.systemCredentialStore: When system secure storage is available, DeepChat stores the SQLite password in the OS credential vault (macOS Keychain, Windows Credential Vault, or a Linux secret store). After one successful unlock, later startups usually open automatically; you only need to enter the encryption key again after data migration, when the OS credential is missing or cannot be decrypted, or when secure storage is unavailable.
databaseEncryption.safeStorageUnavailable: Electron safeStorage is not available on this system. After enabling encryption, you must enter the password on every startup.
databaseEncryption.failedDescription: Check the password and try again.
databaseEncryption.enableDialogDescription: Create an encrypted SQLite database and migrate the current local data into it.
databaseEncryption.changeDialogDescription: Migrate the current encrypted database into a new encrypted database with the new password.
databaseEncryption.disableDialogDescription: Migrate the current encrypted database back to a plaintext local database.

modelConfigUpdate.title: Update Model Config
modelConfigUpdate.updatedDescription: The latest provider metadata has been refreshed.
modelConfigUpdate.upToDateDescription: Your local model config is already using the latest provider metadata.
modelConfigUpdate.failedDescription: Unable to refresh model config right now. Please try again later.

yoBrowser.clearFailedDescription: Please try again or check the logs for more information.
yoBrowser.clearedDescription: The sandbox session has been reset and the associated tab will be reloaded.
yoBrowser.confirmDescription: The YoBrowser session's cookies, cache, LocalStorage, IndexedDB and other data will be deleted, and you may need to log in to the website again.
yoBrowser.description:
An independent browser sandbox that does not share cookies and local storage with the main application. 
YoBrowser data can be cleared with one click here.
yoBrowser.title: YoBrowser Sandbox

data.privacyDescription: Manage backup, sync, privacy mode, maintenance, and dangerous operations.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.description: Reset chat, knowledge, or all data. This cannot be undone.

providerImport.entryDescription: Scan CC Switch, Alma, Cherry Studio, Hermes, and OpenClaw for provider credentials and model lists.
providerImport.dialogDescription: Select detected apps first, then review the providers DeepChat can import.
providerImport.scanningDescription: DeepChat checks known local config files without sending data anywhere.
providerImport.sourcesDescription: Choose one or more agents. Selected agents are processed in the order shown.
providerImport.noSourcesDescription: Install one of the supported agents or configure provider credentials there first.
providerImport.overwriteNote: If multiple selected providers map to the same DeepChat provider, the later source overwrites the earlier one.
providerImport.noProvidersTitle: No provider data in this source
providerImport.noProvidersDescription: This agent was selected, but no importable provider entry was found.
providerImport.importingDescription: DeepChat is writing selected providers and custom model entries.
providerImport.doneDescription: Imported {count} provider(s). Review the per-provider result below.

warnings.already_configured: Already configured in DeepChat, so it is not selected by default.
warnings.missing_api_key: Missing API key or required endpoint.
warnings.unsupported_provider: DeepChat cannot import this provider automatically.
warnings.overwrites_previous_selection: This selection conflicts with an earlier source.
warnings.credential_only_import: Only the API key will be imported; DeepChat keeps its built-in endpoint and runtime.

conflicts.overridesPrevious: This selection will overwrite an earlier selected provider.
conflicts.overwrittenByLater: A later selected source will overwrite this provider.

dashboard.title: Usage Dashboard
dashboard.description: Track token usage, cache hits, and estimated cost. Token and cost figures are estimated from public information, and some providers or earlier messages may be incomplete, so treat these figures as reference only.

backfill.runningDescription: Usage data is still being updated in the background. Current results are already available.
backfill.failedDescription: Refresh this page or try again later.

empty.title: No usage stats yet
empty.description: Token usage, cache hits, and estimated cost will appear here once usage data is available.
empty.historyNote: Token and cost figures are estimated from public information. Some providers or earlier messages may be incomplete, so treat these figures as reference only.

summary.totalTokensDescription: Shows how input and output tokens contribute to the total.
summary.cachedTokensDescription: Prompt tokens served from provider cache.
summary.cacheHitRateDescription: Cached prompt tokens divided by total input tokens.
summary.estimatedCostDescription: Estimated in USD using provider pricing or AIHubMix fallback pricing.
summary.estimatedCostTrendEmpty: No cost recorded in the last 30 days.
summary.recordingStartedAtDescription: The earliest usage record currently stored in this dashboard.
summary.withDeepChatDaysSentence: You are on day {days} with DeepChat.
summary.withDeepChatDaysDescription: Based on your earliest usage record from {date}.
summary.nostalgiaDaysDetail: You and DeepChat have spent {days} days together.
summary.nostalgiaMostActiveDayDetail: {date} was your most active day, with {count} messages.

calendar.title: Contribution Calendar
calendar.description: Daily token usage over the last 365 days.

breakdown.providerDescription: Ranked by estimated cost, then by total tokens.
breakdown.modelDescription: Top 10 models by estimated cost, then by total tokens.

rtk.title: RTK Savings
rtk.description: Estimated tokens prevented from reaching the model context by RTK during DeepChat native command execution.
rtk.descriptionDisabled: RTK is turned off for this app session, so commands run through the normal execution path.
rtk.descriptionChecking: DeepChat is verifying whether RTK can run correctly in the current environment.
rtk.descriptionHealthy: RTK is active for DeepChat native command execution.
rtk.descriptionUnhealthy: RTK failed its startup health check and has been disabled for this app session.

modelConfigItem.chatFallbackWarning: Weak Agent capability: only supports legacy fallback tool calls

systemPrompt.label: System Prompt
systemPrompt.description: Set the system prompt for the AI assistant to define its behavior and role

temperature.label: Model Temperature
temperature.description: Controls the randomness of the output; higher values produce more creative responses

contextLength.label: Context Length
contextLength.description: Set the maximum length of the conversation context

responseLength.label: Response Length
responseLength.description: Set the maximum length of the AI response

artifacts.description: Enabling the Artifacts feature allows the AI to generate richer content
artifacts.title: Artifacts

contextLength.description: Set the context length that the model can handle
contextLength.label: Context Length

modelConfig.description: Please note that this configuration is only valid for the current model and will not affect other models. Please modify it with caution. Incorrect parameters may cause the model to not work properly.

name.label: Model Name
name.description: The display name of the model

id.label: Model ID
id.description: The unique identifier of the model
id.duplicate: A model with this ID already exists

speechRecognition.label: Speech Recognition
speechRecognition.description: Controls whether this model allows voice input with local speech-to-text transcription.

functionCall.description: Whether the model supports function calls natively (DeepChat will automatically simulate function calls after turning off this option)
functionCall.label: Function Calls

maxTokens.description: Set the maximum number of tokens for a single output of the model
maxTokens.label: Maximum output length

reasoningToggle.description: Controls whether reasoning is enabled by default for this model
reasoningToggle.label: Enable reasoning

interleavedThinking.label: Interleaved Thinking
interleavedThinking.description: Controls whether this model handles reasoning and tool-call messages with Interleaved Thinking. Provider defaults are applied automatically.

thinkingBudget.label: Thinking Budget
thinkingBudget.description: Set the maximum token length of the thinking process to control reasoning depth

validation.minValue: Thinking budget value is below the minimum

resetConfirm.message:
Are you sure you want to reset the configuration of this model to the default? 
This operation is irrevocable.
resetConfirm.title: Confirm reset

reasoningEffort.label: Reasoning Effort
reasoningEffort.description: Controls the depth of model reasoning; higher effort produces better results but slower responses

verbosity.label: Verbosity
verbosity.description: Controls the detail level and length of model responses

temperature.description: Control the randomness of the output. Most models are 0-1, and some support between 0-2. Higher values increase randomness.
temperature.fixedMoonshotKimi: Moonshot Kimi K2.5/K2.6 fixes temperature to {enabled} when thinking is enabled and {disabled} when it is disabled.
temperature.label: Temperature

topP.label: Top P
topP.description: Controls nucleus sampling. Leave blank to use the model or provider default.

modelConfig.title: Custom model parameters

validation.contextLengthMin: The context length must be greater than 0
validation.contextLengthRequired: The context length cannot be empty
validation.maxTokensMax: The maximum output length cannot exceed 1000000
validation.maxTokensMin: The maximum output length must be greater than 0
validation.maxTokensRequired: The maximum output length cannot be empty
validation.temperatureMax: The temperature must be less than or equal to 2
validation.temperatureMin: The temperature must be greater than or equal to 0
validation.timeoutMin: Request timeout must be at least 1000ms
validation.topPRange: Top P must be greater than 0 and less than or equal to 1

vision.description: Does the model support visual ability?
vision.label: Visual ability

apiEndpoint.description: Select the OpenAI API endpoint used by this model.
apiEndpoint.label: API endpoint

endpointType.label: Endpoint Type
endpointType.description: Select which upstream protocol New API should use for this model.

reasoningVisibility.label: Reasoning Visibility
reasoningVisibility.description: Controls whether reasoning content is omitted or shown as summarized notes when reasoning is enabled

timeout.label: Request Timeout (ms)
timeout.description: Set the timeout for a single model request. If exceeded, the request will be aborted.

size.label: Image size
size.experimental: Sizes above 2560x1440 are marked experimental by OpenAI.

validation.invalid_multiple: Width and height must be multiples of 16.
validation.side_too_large: Width and height must be 3840px or less.
validation.aspect_ratio_too_large: The long side cannot be more than 3x the short side.
validation.pixel_count_out_of_range: Total pixels must be between 655360 and 8294400.

outputCompression.label: Compression
outputCompression.validation: Compression must be an integer from 0 to 100.

duration.label: Duration
duration.description: Sent through extra_body.duration for compatible video endpoints.

watermark.label: Watermark
watermark.description: Request a provider-side watermark when the upstream endpoint supports it.

generateAudio.label: Generate audio
generateAudio.description: Request an audio track together with the generated video when supported.

npmRegistry.invalidUrlDesc: Please enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS address
npmRegistry.testFailedDesc: Cannot connect to {registry}, error: {error}. Please check if the URL is correct or network connection.
npmRegistry.redetectCompleteDesc: Detected and set the current optimal NPM registry
npmRegistry.redetectFailedDesc: Unable to re-detect optimal registry, will use default configuration

mcp.managedServerReadOnlyDesc: Manage enablement and permissions from the owning plugin settings.

scheduledTasks.title: Scheduled Tasks
scheduledTasks.description: Fire a system notification or send a preset prompt to an agent at a chosen time.
scheduledTasks.hint: One-shot tasks missed while the app was closed fire on next launch; recurring tasks jump to the next slot.

action.title: Action
action.description: Choose a notification or an Agent prompt.

scheduledTasks.listDescription: Manage schedules, actions, and enabled status in one place.

display.fontFamilyDesc: Select the primary UI font. Leave empty to use the built-in stack.
display.codeFontFamilyDesc: Applies to code blocks and any monospaced areas.
display.fontUsageHint: Some interfaces require restarting the application to take effect. If the font is unavailable, it will automatically fall back to the default font.
display.floatingButtonDesc: Display a floating button on the desktop to quickly activate the application window

shortcuts.title: Shortcut Key Settings
shortcuts.pressEnterToSave: Press Enter to save, Esc to cancel
shortcuts.noModifierOnly: Cannot use modifier key alone as shortcut
shortcuts.keyConflict: Shortcut key conflict, please choose another combination

acp.title: ACP Agents
acp.description: Manage local Agent Client Protocol agents started by DeepChat.
acp.enabledDescription: When enabled, configured ACP agents will appear as models in the selector.
acp.useBuiltinRuntimeDescription: When enabled, bypasses system node and uv commands, using DeepChat's bundled versions.
acp.registryInstallEntryDescription: Search and install agents from the ACP Registry, then come back here to enable and configure them.
acp.builtinSectionDescription: Each built-in agent can have multiple launch profiles. Only enabled agents with an active profile appear in the model list.
acp.customSectionDescription: Wrap any ACP-compatible command as a reusable model entry.
acp.mcpAccessEmpty: There is currently no optional MCP.
acp.sharedMcpDescription: All ACP agents share the same MCP access selection.
acp.installedSectionDescription: Only installed registry agents appear here for enablement, inspection, and env overrides.
acp.installedEmptyDescription: Install an agent from the ACP Registry first, then configure it here.
acp.registryOverlayEmpty: No agents match the current filters.
acp.registryUninstallDescription: DeepChat will disable this agent and clear locally managed install data when applicable. You can install it again later from the ACP Registry.
acp.registryInstallDescription: Search, filter, and install ACP agents. Configure them back in settings after installation.
acp.missingFieldsDesc: Please fill in both name and command before saving.
acp.argsPlaceholder: Optional, separated by spaces. Use quotes to keep arguments together.

profileDialog.builtinHint: Use different presets for each scenario and switch them in the selector.
profileDialog.customHint: Provide the command, arguments, and env vars to launch your agent.

profileManager.title: Profiles
profileManager.description: Switch, edit, or delete saved launch profiles.
profileManager.cannotDeleteDesc: Built-in agents require at least one configuration.
profileManager.noAgent: Select an agent to manage its profiles.

dependency.title: Missing External Dependencies
dependency.description: The following dependencies need to be installed before initialization.

debug.title: ACP Debug
debug.description: Send raw ACP calls to "{name}" and watch the responses.
debug.payloadHint: Edit the JSON body before sending.
debug.customMethodRequired: Provide a method name for extension calls

acp.registryEmpty: No registry agents are available for the current filters.

rateLimit.title: Rate Limit
rateLimit.description: Control request interval to prevent exceeding API limits
rateLimit.intervalHelper: Minimum interval between requests, disable rate limiting if not needed
rateLimit.confirmDisableMessage: Value cannot be less than or equal to 0. Do you want to disable rate limiting?

promptSetting.resetToDefaultSuccess: Reset to default system prompt successfully
promptSetting.resetToDefaultFailed: Failed to reset, please try again

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Manage and configure AI assistant skills

draftSuggestions.title: Suggest Skill Drafts
draftSuggestions.description: After a task is complete, allow the agent to suggest temporary reusable skill drafts. Drafts stay in a temp folder until you choose to import them manually.

skills.emptyHint: Click "Add Skill" to install a new skill

install.title: Install Skill
install.folderHint: Click or drag a skill folder here
install.folderTip: Import skills from other clients like ~/.claude/skills/
install.zipHint: Click or drag a ZIP file here
install.urlHint: Enter the download link for the skill package
install.dragInvalid: Unsupported drop. Drag a skill folder or a single .zip file.
install.basicDescription: Use the existing installer for local folders, ZIP packages, and ZIP download URLs.

delete.title: Delete Skill
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete skill {name}? This action cannot be undone.

edit.title: Edit Skill
edit.name: Name
edit.nameHint: Skill name cannot be changed after creation
edit.runtimeHint: Select how bundled scripts resolve Python and Node runtimes.
edit.envWarning: Masked in the UI only. Values are stored as plain text in the application database.
edit.scriptsHint: Only scripts under scripts/ can be run via skill_run.
edit.scriptDescriptionPlaceholder: Optional description shown to the agent

conflict.title: Skill Already Exists
conflict.description: A skill named "{name}" already exists. Do you want to overwrite it?

sync.title: Sync
sync.importDescription: Import skills from Claude Code, Cursor, and other tools
sync.exportDescription: Export skills to other AI assistant tools
sync.kiroOnDemandDesc: Only used when explicitly requested by the user
sync.kiroConditionalDesc: Automatically included based on file pattern matching

syncStatus.title: External Tools
syncStatus.description: Import skills from other AI coding assistants

syncPrompt.title: New Skills Discovered
syncPrompt.description: We found new skills in other AI coding assistants. Would you like to import them?

agents.title: Agents
agents.emptySkills: No skills found for this agent.

actions.pending: Write actions are enabled in a later phase.

adoptDialog.adoptDescription: Copy this skill into DeepChat, back up the original, and replace the agent entry with a link.
adoptDialog.conflictDescription: {skill} already exists in DeepChat. The default action keeps the current DeepChat skill and adopts this agent skill as a renamed copy.
adoptDialog.unsupportedStrategies: Replace and keep strategies are not available in this build.

syncDialog.title: Sync to {agent}
syncDialog.description: Create DeepChat-owned links for selected skills. Existing agent content is skipped.

git.title: Git
git.description: Scan a Git repository and install selected skills into DeepChat.

importExport.noExportPreview: Preview export to see target states.
importExport.noImportPreview: Preview import to see available skills.

detail.confirmDeleteDescription: Delete skill "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

installToAgent.title: Install {name} to Agent
installToAgent.description: Create a DeepChat-owned link for this skill in a local agent skills directory.
installToAgent.noPreview: Select an agent to view the preview.
installToAgent.successMessage: {name} was linked to the target agent.
installToAgent.disconnectSuccessMessage: {name} is no longer linked to the target agent.

environments.title: Environments
environments.description: Review project directories used by your sessions, open them quickly, or set one as the default for new chats.

default.title: Default Directory
default.description: New chats preselect this directory unless you manually choose a different one.

history.title: History
history.description: Only directories that were actually used by sessions are listed here.

temp.title: Temp Directories
temp.description: Directories under temp roots or app-managed workspaces are grouped here and hidden by default.

confirm.archiveDescription: It leaves the active directory list and new chat picker, while sessions, messages, and the real folder stay intact.
confirm.removeDescription: The real folder and messages are not deleted. Regular sessions move to No project; ACP workdir records are kept so existing sessions can resume.

remote.title: Remote
remote.description: Configure Telegram, Feishu / Lark, QQBot, Discord, and WeChat iLink remote control in one place.

telegram.title: Telegram
telegram.description: Connect a Telegram bot for direct messages, groups, and topic-thread remote control.
telegram.botTokenDescription: Enter the Telegram bot token used for Telegram remote control.

feishu.title: Feishu / Lark
feishu.description: Connect a Feishu bot for direct messages, group chats, and topic threads.
feishu.encryptKeyPlaceholder: Leave empty unless event encryption is enabled
feishu.accessRulesDescription: Pair in a direct message first. In groups, only paired users who {'@'} mention the bot can drive a session.
feishu.accessRule1: Authorize yourself with /pair [code] in a direct bot chat, or use OAuth scan authorization for a manually configured app.
feishu.accessRule2: In groups and topics, the bot only reacts when an authorized user {'@'} mentions it.
feishu.setupGuideTitle: Finish manual app setup from the Echo Bot guide
feishu.setupGuideDescription: DeepChat can open the console and bot chat, but app creation, permission grants, event subscription, and version publishing still need confirmation in the Feishu / Lark console.
feishu.setupStepCreateApp: Create a self-built app and add the bot capability.
feishu.setupStepPermissions: Grant im:message.p2p_msg:readonly, im:message.group_at_msg:readonly, im:message:send_as_bot, plus the user-info permission required for scan binding.
feishu.setupStepEvents: Use long-connection event subscription and add im.message.receive_v1.
feishu.setupStepPublish: Create and publish a version, and ensure the current user is in the app availability scope.
feishu.openBotChatMissingAppIdDescription: Enter and save the App ID before opening the bot chat.
feishu.scanAuthDescription: Fallback for an existing manually configured app: scan or sign in to add the current user's Open ID to the same authorized-principal list.
feishu.authStarted: Authorization window opened. Scan or sign in with Feishu / Lark to confirm.
feishu.authDenied: The user cancelled or denied authorization.
feishu.authMissingCode: Authorization callback did not include a code.
feishu.authStateMismatch: Authorization state verification failed. Start scan authorization again.
feishu.authTimeout: Authorization timed out. Start scan authorization again.
feishu.authSessionMissing: Authorization session is missing or has ended.
feishu.installDescription: Create an official PersonalAgent install session without configuring a local OAuth callback. Choose whether to open the official web page or scan an in-app QR code generated from that same install link.
feishu.installStarted: Install session ready. Open the web page or scan the QR code with Feishu / Lark to create or authorize the PersonalAgent app.
feishu.installTimeout: Install timed out. Start a new install session and try again.
feishu.installSessionMissing: Install session is missing or has ended.
feishu.manualSetupDescription: If PersonalAgent install is unavailable in your tenant, keep using the developer console flow below. DeepChat no longer requires the local OAuth redirect URI for the primary install path.
feishu.installQrDescription: This QR code is generated directly from the official install link returned by Feishu / Lark. Scan it in the mobile client and keep this dialog open.
feishu.userAuthDescription: After the bot app is installed, authorized Feishu / Lark users can control DeepChat. Use /pair in the bot chat, or use OAuth scan authorization for an existing manually configured app; both update the same authorized-principal list.
feishu.pairAuthDescription: Click Pair below, then send /pair code in a direct chat with the bot. This is the recommended authorization path and still works with installed PersonalAgent apps.
feishu.streamingCardsDescription: Stream AI replies through Feishu / Lark CardKit in real time. Requires im:message and cardkit:card:write permissions; DeepChat falls back to normal messages if CardKit fails.

discord.title: Discord
discord.description: Connect a Discord bot for DMs, channel mentions, and slash-command remote control.
discord.remoteControlDescription: Discord remote control uses its own bot token, gateway, and REST flow.
discord.accessRule1: Send /pair [code] in a DM or target channel to authorize the current Discord endpoint.
discord.accessRule2: Channel messages only enter the conversation when the bot is mentioned, which avoids absorbing regular chat.

remoteControl.description: Bind each remote endpoint to one session and keep the session available across commands.
remoteControl.defaultWorkdirHelper: Workspace directory for remote sessions. Required when the default agent is ACP.
remoteControl.pairDialogDescription: Generate a pairing code and finish pairing from your {channel} bot chat.
remoteControl.pairDialogInstructionTelegram: Send this command to the Telegram bot:
remoteControl.pairDialogInstructionFeishu: Send this command in a Feishu / Lark bot direct chat; it adds the sender to the same authorized-principal list used by scan authorization:
remoteControl.pairDialogInstructionDiscord: Send this command to the Discord bot in a DM or target channel:
remoteControl.bindingsDialogDescription: Remove remote endpoint bindings one by one.
remoteControl.pairingSuccessDescription: The paired principal list has been refreshed.
remoteControl.pairDialogInstructionQQBot: Send this command to the QQ bot chat or authorized QQ group:
remoteControl.authorizedPrincipalsDescription: These {channel} accounts are authorized to pair and control sessions.
remoteControl.sessionBindingsDescription: Each remote endpoint below is currently bound to one DeepChat session.
remoteControl.acpDefaultWorkdirRequiredDescription: ACP agents need a local workspace. Pick a Default Directory before saving.

hooks.title: Telegram Hooks
hooks.description: Reuse the same Telegram bot for hook notifications.

qqbot.title: QQBot
qqbot.description: Connect an official QQ Bot for C2C chats and authorized group mention-based bot control.
qqbot.remoteControlDescription: QQ official openid identifiers differ between C2C and groups, so direct messages pair users while groups are authorized separately with /pair.

weixinIlink.title: WeChat iLink
weixinIlink.description: Connect an official WeChat iLink Bot through QR login, then route remote control sessions through the built-in adapter.
weixinIlink.loginDescription: Click the button below to open the official WeChat login window. Complete the iLink Bot authorization there, and the connected account will be added here automatically.
weixinIlink.ownerOnlyNotice: This first version only allows the QR-login owner account to control DeepChat.
weixinIlink.loginDialogDescription: The official WeChat login page opens in a separate window. Complete the QR authorization there and keep this dialog open until the connection finishes.
weixinIlink.accountsDescription: Each connected iLink Bot account runs independently and keeps its own bindings and runtime state.
weixinIlink.noAccounts: No WeChat iLink accounts connected yet.
weixinIlink.remoteControlDescription: Set the default agent shared by WeChat iLink accounts, then manage the bindings created by incoming sessions.
weixinIlink.loginWindowOpened: The official WeChat login window has been opened. Complete the QR authorization there.
weixinIlink.loginSessionExpired: This login session has expired. Reopen the login window and try again.
weixinIlink.loginResponseIncomplete: The WeChat iLink login response was incomplete. Please try again.
weixinIlink.loginTimedOut: Timed out waiting for WeChat iLink authorization. Reopen the login window and try again.
weixinIlink.loginConnected: The WeChat iLink account has been connected.

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.officialOnly: Manage built-in official plugins included with this DeepChat version.
plugins.emptyDescription: This platform has no built-in official plugins in this DeepChat version.

pluginsHub.subtitle: Work with DeepChat across skills, MCP servers, official plugins, and remote channels.
pluginsHub.cuaDescription: DeepChat's ComputerUse plugin built on the trycua/cua project.
pluginsHub.agentScopeDescription: Choose which globally installed plugins, skills, and MCP servers the current DeepChat agent can use. Plugin-owned MCP servers follow plugin selection.
pluginsHub.agentScopeUnsupported: Agent-scoped extensions are only available for DeepChat agents.
pluginsHub.agentScopeDenyAllSummary: None selected; this category is disabled for this agent.

overview.title: Settings Overview
overview.description: Review provider, MCP, DeepChat Agents, data, and usage status in one place.
overview.searchPlaceholder: Search settings, providers, models, agents, MCP...

activity.title: Recent settings changes
activity.description: Shows the newest 200 settings changes while retaining the newest 2000 records.
activity.emptyDescription: Successful settings changes will appear here.

memory.description: Review, configure, and manage what each agent remembers across sessions. Memory is scoped per agent.

config.rootHint: deepchat is the built-in agent and the configuration root: values set here become the defaults inherited by other agents.
config.extractionModelHint: Model used to extract and deduplicate memories. Falls back to the chat model when unset.
config.injectionBudgetHint: Approximate token ceiling for the assembled memory injection. Leave empty to inherit the default ({default}).
config.retrievalHint: Override how recalled memories are ranked; inherits the defaults when off.
config.advancedHint: Tune extraction, prompt budget, and retrieval ranking. Leave fields empty to inherit defaults.
